{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output identifies CAMEL, Generative Agents, and tool-augmented controllers as prior work but doesn't delve into specific deltas or comparative analysis.",
    "R1.7": "While the revised draft mentions several works, it lacks precise citations for all of them. Some years are missing.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents its claims as factual without explicitly acknowledging uncertainty about any specific points.",
    "RX.3": "The output stays within the scope of discussing multi-agent collaboration with LLMs and doesn't drift into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The revisions appear to be aimed at improving accuracy and clarity, avoiding the introduction of new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The output describes the changes made but doesn't provide specific details about source attribution or reasoning behind each modification."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output identifies CAMEL, Generative Agents, and tool-augmented controllers as prior work but doesn't delve into specific deltas or comparative analysis.
rationale.R1.7: While the revised draft mentions several works, it lacks precise citations for all of them. Some years are missing.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents its claims as factual without explicitly acknowledging uncertainty about any specific points.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the scope of discussing multi-agent collaboration with LLMs and doesn't drift into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The revisions appear to be aimed at improving accuracy and clarity, avoiding the introduction of new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output describes the changes made but doesn't provide specific details about source attribution or reasoning behind each modification.
